Interface IClassSchemaEdit3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that modify an object class's extension properties.

[Guid("4B35F814-0417-47E3-8DFC-CAD58746693B")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IClassSchemaEdit3 : IClassSchemaEdit2, IClassSchemaEdit

Methods

AddGlobalID(string)

Adds a global ID column to a class and populates it with GUIDs.

FieldName string
